title: slice.start
description: Emitted by the legacy single-delivery slice executor design as it begins implementing one Delivery-Slicing slice inside a guarded session. The single-delivery analogue of story.dispatch.start (one per Story per attempt): a slice is the leaf work unit of a spec-only plan that authored no Story tickets, so the ledger carries the slice id + position instead of a storyId. Introduced INERT in Epic #4475 M4-A alongside the slice-map checkpoint; current /deliver Story delivery uses helpers/deliver-story instead.
